---
name: OpenHands CI-check demo
about: Create a labeled issue that asks OpenHands to add a new CI check
title: "[ci] "
labels: ["oh:add-ci-check"]
---

## Goal
Describe the CI check you want.

## Why this check matters
- What failure should it catch?
- When should it run?
- How strict should it be?

## Suggested implementation
- Workflow name:
- Commands to run:
- Expected pass criteria:

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] New workflow or targeted CI update
- [ ] No overlap with existing Maven, CodeQL, or dependency-review jobs
- [ ] Draft PR linked back to this issue
